subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Bachomeke, balete bishimi, bambe tulukusha njimi ne kupana kishimpi kimo
topics: Uno mutwe wa amba pa misango ya biñambwañambwa ne byo bingila mingilo mu bwikalo.
Uno mutwe muji lufunjisho lubena kutala pa misango ya byanembewa nabiji: nsansawilo,
